creator: asaddi@philosophysw.com
text:
wmmon fails to compile under 2.2.x due to a reference to devstat_errbuf:

===>  Building for wmmon-1.0b2
cc -c -O -pipe -g -Wall -I/usr/X11R6/include wmmon.c -o wmmon.o
wmmon.c: In function `main':
wmmon.c:223: warning: implicit declaration of function `checkversion'
wmmon.c:225: `devstat_errbuf' undeclared (first use this function)
wmmon.c:225: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
wmmon.c:225: for each function it appears in.)
*** Error code 1

Fix: Move into sysutils/wmmon/patches. Note: Untested under -current!
	
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/sysutils/wmmon && make
